subject: Ecology
title: Predation
description: A quick, practical guide to Predation.

hook.text: A cheetah chasing a gazelle is ecology in fast-forward—one lives, one doesn't.

buildup.text: Predators keep prey populations in check, preventing overgrazing or overcrowding.

discovery.text: Prey evolve defenses: camouflage, toxins, speed. Predators evolve sharper senses.

twist.text: Remove a top predator and prey explode, then crash from resource depletion.

climax.text: The lynx-hare cycle in Canada shows decade-long oscillations driven by predation.

punchline.text: Predators don't just kill. They balance.

quiz.question: What happens when a top predator is removed?
